name: Cshg Atrium Shopping Santo Andr Fundo De Investimento Imobilirio Fii
summary: Cshg Atrium Shopping Santo Andr Fundo De Investimento Imobilirio Fii is a real estate investment fund (FII) focused on investments in shopping centers located in Santo André, Brazil. It aims to generate income for investors through the rental and sale of commercial properties.
